text: Being here, I am enveloped by the aura of inquiry and invention. My mind feels sharpened by anticipation—these rooms are dedicated to curiosity and exploration. The glass wall suggests transparency and openness, inviting me to look at humanity’s future with a spirit of collaboration and wonder. The vibrant R+D display pulses with creativity and a hunger for answers. I feel both humbled and energized, as if I am standing on the threshold of discovery, my own thoughts swirling between uncertainty and potential.
